text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Whoa... what a race! Narita Brian is unstoppable!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Awww... Ogurin lost...

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
To think she'd even take down Oguri! No one can
get in her way!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
She's already at the Emperor's level—no, maybe
even higher!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll admit, you utterly defeated me. Thanks for the
great race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hah... What are you saying? Your eyes haven't
lost their spirit yet.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That doesn't change that I lost, and now you'll go
on ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: The other day...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I heard Symboli Rudolf is racing in the next Japan
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: She's strong. Much stronger than me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You can't afford to let your guard down. She's the
undefeated Triple Crown Champion... the
Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I am keenly aware of her strength. More than
anyone.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And yet, you're still going after that strength.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Guess I'll get going, then. I've got to say hello to
everyone...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And let them know I'm not giving up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf is running in the Japan Cup,
right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A feature that aired on the news earlier said as
much.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: There you have it! Rudolf will be running!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I will be competing in the upcoming
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I understand Narita Brian will be contending for
the Senior Autumn Triple Crown, starting with the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've decided to take part in order to meet her
head on.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ohhh!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Uh, in that case, would you say that she's your
rival?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I don't think "rival" is an accurate description.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let us just say that I'm simply... curious.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Between the current Brian and myself, who will
prove themselves to be stronger?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: "The current Brian," huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Your cool face is betraying your excitement...
President.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Still... she's stronger than anyone else. Turning tail
and running from this match is not an option.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I want to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She remains tense for some time afterward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second race of the Senior Autumn Triple
Crown is the Japan Cup, where the strongest
racers await us.
